questions.question: When should the scheduled export run?

options.label: Custom time
options.description: Enter day and time in the text field below (e.g. every Sunday at 10:30pm, every Monday at 8am — local time)

questions.question: How many days of logs should each scheduled export cover?
Where is the export-chat-logs plugin installed?

options.label: User scope (Recommended)
options.description: Installed globally — no project directory needed

options.label: Project scope
options.description: Installed in a specific project — enter the project path in the text field below

options.label: Local dev (git clone)
options.description: Not installed — enter the plugin directory path in the text field below (e.g. /path/to/devtools-plugins/plugins/export-chat-logs)
